name: Vampire: The Masquerade - L.A. By Night
original_name: Vampire: The Masquerade - L.A. By Night
overview: A dark tale of personal horror and inhuman conspiracy that sees four vampires doing their best to navigate the macabre affairs and terrifying realities of surviving the L.A. night.
